top_signals.title: Will China and the United States Pursue Strategic Stability?
top_signals.summary:
In 2024, Michael Swaine wrote, “How to Stop the United States and China from Sliding into War,” where he identified areas that could increase the possibility of an armed conflict between the United States and China. Two years later, after recent talks between President Trump and President Xi, we asked Michael to revisit his arguments.Image: U.S. Department of StateIn your 2024 article, you flagged a rising possibility of major armed conflict between China and the United States. That was before American forces became militarily involved in Iran. Does that involvement change your calculus? And critically — does it deter Beijing,

The post Will China and the United States Pursue Strategic Stability? appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Canada’s TerraVest Slides as Chairman Accused of Insider Tipping
top_signals.summary: Shares of Canadian manufacturer TerraVest Industries Inc. fell the most since 2009 over allegations of insider tipping by its executive chairman.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: 39 migrants rescued from burning trailer after South Texas smuggling chase
top_signals.summary:
Law officers rescued 39 suspected undocumented migrants from a locked trailer that caught fire Thursday during a pursuit in South Texas.

The post 39 migrants rescued from burning trailer after South Texas smuggling chase  appeared first on FreightWaves.

top_signals.title: Dark web Nemesis Market vendor gets 26 years for selling drugs
top_signals.summary: A California man was sentenced to more than 26 years in federal prison for trafficking fentanyl and methamphetamine through Nemesis Market, one of the world's largest dark web marketplaces. [...]
